texts.SamplePageMessage: A sample page for the KatKat module
texts.KatKat:010001: A complex can only be created inside a tenant scope.
texts.KatKat:010002: A complex with the name '{name}' already exists.
texts.KatKat:010003: The new subscription end date must be later than the current one.
texts.KatKat:020001: A building named '{name}' already exists in this complex.
texts.KatKat:020002: Floor count must be a positive number.
texts.KatKat:030001: A flat numbered '{flatNumber}' already exists in this building.
texts.KatKat:030002: Share factor must be greater than zero.
texts.KatKat:040001: This user is already a member of the flat.
texts.KatKat:040002: Only unverified residents can be approved.
texts.KatKat:040003: An unverified resident cannot be promoted directly. Approve them first.
